name: Can I get workers comp for a neck strain from lifting boxes at my warehouse job in Ogden?
description: Yes, if work-related and proven by medical evidence.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp for a neck strain from lifting boxes at my warehouse job in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work-related and proven by medical evidence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if the injury arose out of and in the course of employment, neck strains from work lifting are typically compensable under Utah law.[1] Medical evidence must link the injury to work activities.[1][2] Key factors: (1) Prove work caused or aggravated it; (2) No pre-existing condition bar if work worsened it; (3) Idiopathic falls may qualify if work surface increased harm.[4] Report immediately and get evaluated. This positions you for medical and wage benefits.
